items.text:
うんこを食べたら体調が悪くなる。


学習ポイント: 「うんこ」を使って、不適切な行為について警告を与える表現である。


英訳: Eating poop can make you sick.

items.image_prompt: Draw exactly the situation described by the Japanese sentence below. Use the sentence itself as the source of truth for who appears, what they do, what object is important, and what kind of scene it is. Do not use the study point, translation, or any extra explanation as image content. Do not add unrelated people, food, animals, buildings, decorations, letters, captions, speech bubbles, watermark, or logo. Keep the composition simple and make one still image that directly visualizes the sentence. Japanese sentence: うんこを食べたら体調が悪くなる。 Ignore these extra feed fields if they are present after the sentence: study notes, learning points, translations, labels, metadata.
items.image_negative: photorealistic, text, watermark, logo, low quality, blurry, underexposed, too dark
